summary: 既知execute subcommandのrepair flag silent no-opと、未知subcommandをtyped errorへ誤分類する回帰はともに解消され、現HEADのCLI・Spec・文書・回帰テスト・実行結果が一致する。
inspection_summary: 現HEAD 2bb11b5でreview request、af070b8からの差分、execute全routing、Architecture、Test Plan、Spec C-001/C-006、旧finding、current-head verification artifactを確認し、focused 36 testsと未知commandのflag有無を実CLIで再実行した。
inspection_evidence: HEAD 2bb11b59fc1fef5c9b018073918e3eb7eb4722dd; tracked worktree clean; git diff --check af070b8..HEAD passed

src/cli.js:2098-2115 restricts repair rejection to the complete known execute subcommand set; src/cli.js:2116-2218 dispatches that same set and src/cli.js:2219-2220 preserves the unknown-command fallback
test/guarded-run-session.test.js:517-575 covers every recognized non-watch execute surface in alternating human/JSON modes, the unknown fallback, and absence of execution artifacts

docs/architecture/story-vibepro-guarded-run-session-contract.md Command contract, docs/management/test-plans/story-vibepro-guarded-run-session-contract.md:12-21, and spec clauses C-001/C-006 state the same compatibility boundary
fresh real CLI comparison: execute nonsense with and without --repair-linked-copy --json both emitted Unknown execute command: nonsense and exited 1
strict-head recorded evidence: targeted 36/36 and full suite 1126/1126 passed at 2bb11b59fc1fef5c9b018073918e3eb7eb4722dd
judgment_delta: Initial concern: repair-flag-silent-outside-watch might remain on a legacy or guarded branch. Final conclusion: resolved because the known-command guard executes before every recognized non-watch dispatch, human/JSON assertions cover all nine recognized path variants, and no execution artifact is created.

Initial concern from af070b8: the repair guard intercepted unknown execute commands. Final conclusion: resolved because the guard now requires knownExecuteSubcommands.has(subcommand), the new assertion is pre-fix-sensitive, and real CLI runs with and without the flag both preserve Unknown execute command plus exit 1.

Initial evidence concern: the prior review reuse input was stale. Final conclusion: role pass is supported independently by fresh execution and by targeted/full-suite artifacts bound to 2bb11b5; pr-prepare still reports other workflow gates and stale review artifacts, which is overall readiness work rather than a regression_risk defect in this fix.

resolved_findings.detail: Resolved at 2bb11b5: --repair-linked-copy is rejected only for recognized non-watch execute commands, so an unknown token reaches the established unknown-command fallback and exits 1.
resolved_findings.evidence: src/cli.js:2098-2115,2219-2220; test/guarded-run-session.test.js:555-570; fresh real CLI comparison for nonsense with and without the flag

resolved_findings.detail: Resolved since af070b8 and reverified at 2bb11b5: every recognized non-watch execute route rejects the option visibly before dispatch, reads, identity resolution, or mutation in human or JSON form.
